zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Curzon於1089年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可洛薩爾時，他的父親Hubert De Curzon21歲，母親Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sister21歲。他於大約1125年與Beatrix d'Aufay在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1150年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Curzon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Notre-Dame-de-Courson in Calvados, France, which was named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Curtius (from curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -o, genitive -onis. There is also a place called Curzon in Vendée, but this is not the source of the English surname.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Curzon was born in 1089, in Croxall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hubert De Curzon, was 21 and his mother, Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sister, was 21. He married Beatrix d'Aufay about 1125, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1150, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Curzon est né en 1089, à Croxall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hubert De Curzon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sister, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix d'Aufay environ 1125, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1150, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Curzon 1089 in Croxall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hubert De Curzon 21 und seine Mutter Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sister 21. Er hat um 1125 in England Beatrix d'Aufay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1150 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Curzon è nato il nel 1089 nel Croxall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hubert De Curzon, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sister, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix d'Aufay circa 1125, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1150, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Curzonが1089年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアクロクサルで生まれた時，父Hubert De Curzonは21歳，母Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sisterは21歳であった。約1125年にイギリスでBeatrix d'Aufayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1150年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Curzon(이)가 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 크록스알에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hubert De Curzon(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sister(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1125년 영국에서 Beatrix d'Aufay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1150년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Curzon родился в 1089 г. в местности кроксалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hubert De Curzon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Heiress CURZON DECURZON Sister, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix d'Aufay около 1125 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1150 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
